title: OmniFormatter JSON / YAML / TOML / XML / INI / CSV / Protobuf Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for data serialization formats. All fields optional.

indentationSpaces.description: Spaces per indentation level. 0 = minified output. Applies to JSON, YAML, XML.

useTabs.description: Tabs are PROHIBITED in YAML and strongly discouraged in other formats.

json__sortKeys.description: [JSON] Sort object keys alphabetically on format.

json__trailingCommas.description: [JSON] Trailing commas are INVALID in strict JSON (RFC 8259). Only valid in JSON5.

yaml__documentSeparator.description: [YAML] Add --- document separator at the start of each document.

toml__arrayStyle.description: [TOML] Inline arrays [...] vs block-style multi-line arrays.

xml__selfClosingElements.description:
[XML] Collapse empty elements to self-closing form
.

xml__xmlDeclaration.description: [XML] Require <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> at the top.

xml__attributesOnNewLines.description: [XML] Put each attribute on its own line.

ini__commentStyle.description: [INI] Character to use for inline comments.

csv__quoteStrings.description: [CSV] Always quote string fields even when not necessary.

protobuf__fieldNumbering.description: [Protobuf] Prefer sequential field numbers. NEVER reuse deleted field numbers.

protobuf__enumZeroFirst.description: [Protobuf] Enforce that the first enum value maps to 0 (proto3 requirement).
